CustomField.formula:
/*"https://"&$Setup.Form_Titan_Domain__c.Domain__c&"/UploadFilesAccount?fld38="& AccountId*/
"https://"&$Setup.Form_Titan_Domain__c.Domain__c&if( Campaign.Name = 'תיירות מרפא- אנגלית',"/UploadFilesEnglish?fld38=",if( Campaign.Name = 'תיירות מרפא- רוסית', "/UploadFilesRussian?fld38=","/UploadFilesAccount?fld38="))& Case__c
CustomField.label: Link Upload Files
